    C

    calculatePlayerEfficiencyScore() - Method in class logic.GameInstance
    Calculate player's efficiency score
    formula : Math.clamp( (playerCash - 100) / maximumDay )
    cashLabel - Static variable in class gui.GameScene
    The label displaying the current cash amount.
    cashNotiBox - Variable in class gui.GameScene
    The UI container for cash notifications.
    cashNotify(int) - Method in class gui.GameScene
    Add notification label for cash.

    Setter for background URL of this room

    Changes the cookbook page in the given direction.
    changeRoom(WalkDirection) - Method in class logic.GameInstance
    Changing currentRoomIndex field according to given walk direction.

    Chocolate flavor.
    chop() - Method in interface entity.Choppable
    Set chopped state to true if chop conditions of that ingredient are met.

    Set chopped state to true if chop conditions of that ingredient are met.

    Set chopped state to true if chop conditions of that ingredient are met.

    Set chopped state to true if chop conditions of that ingredient are met.
    chop() - Method in class entity.ingredients.Potato
    Set chopped state to true if chop conditions of that ingredient are met.
    chop() - Method in class entity.ingredients.Tomato
    Set chopped state to true if chop conditions of that ingredient are met.
    Choppable - Interface in entity
    Interface for choppable ingredient which can be interacted with using Chopping Board
    chopped - Variable in class entity.ingredients.Dough
    Whether the dough has been chopped.
    chopped - Variable in class entity.ingredients.Egg
    Whether the egg has been chopped (cracked).
    chopped - Variable in class entity.ingredients.Lettuce
    Whether the lettuce has been chopped.
    chopped - Variable in class entity.ingredients.Potato
    Whether the potato has been chopped.
    chopped - Variable in class entity.ingredients.Tomato
    Whether the tomato has been chopped.
